pillars.label: Availability
pillars.desc: Is the SKU present, on the showroom floor, and in stock at the dealer?

kpis.label: On-Shelf Availability
kpis.desc: Unit is actually on the showroom floor and viewable by shoppers, not just in the stockroom

kpis.label: Out of Stock Rate
kpis.desc: Units that should be in stock but are missing or unavailable at time of audit

pillars.label: Dealer Compliance
pillars.desc: Is the unit correctly placed on the floor and are POSM materials present as agreed?

kpis.label: Product Placement
kpis.desc: Floor/display placement matches the agreed layout

kpis.label: POSM Presence
kpis.desc: POSM present at the dealer and in good condition

pillars.label: Inventory
pillars.desc: Does the dealer's counted stock on hand match what should be there?

kpis.label: Stock Variance
kpis.desc: Gap between counted and expected unit count on hand

pillars.label: Competitor
pillars.desc: How Astron's pricing and product line-up compare against the real appliance brands competing for the same dealer floor space.

kpis.label: Competitor Price Index
kpis.desc: Astron's average SRP vs. competitor average SRP, by category (100 = price parity)

Camel 7.5cu.ft. No Frost Refrigerator CRF-BNF751V-SS
Hanabishi Double Door Refrigerator HAMDDREF28
Fujidenzo 8kg Electric Front Load Sensor Dryer DRI-801 WG
Fujidenzo 6.8kg Single Tub Washer with Eco-Soak Wash Cycle JWS 680
Hanabishi 7.0kg Single Tub Washing Machine HWM 170
Hanabishi 7.5kg Fully Automatic Top Load washing Machine HAWMD175LX
Camel 1600W Stainless Steel Sole Plate Flat Iron CFI-1080S
Camel 484W With Soak Function Twin Tub Washing Machine WMTT-P88
Imarflex 20L Microwave Oven MO-J20R
Imarflex 1.5L Smart Insulated Electric Kettle IKW-715DS
XTREME 250W Karaoke Speaker (XK-250)
Promac 8in KTV Karaoke Passive Speaker KTV-825
Promac 8in Passive Speaker SR-806
JBL RISE Bluetooth clock radio speaker with FM
JBL HORIZON 2 FM

drivers: Hanabishi and Camel undercut Astron on entry-level TV, aircon, and kitchen SRPs by 10–25%, winning price-sensitive shoppers in hardware and general-merchandise channels.
TCL and Skyworth lead with Mini-LED/QLED and Google TV features at mid-range prices, pulling upgrade-minded buyers away from Astron's standard LED line-up.
Fujidenzo and Imarflex have deeper distribution in supermarkets and department stores, giving their laundry and kitchen SKUs more walk-in visibility than Astron's.
XTREME and JBL's party-speaker and Bluetooth audio lines ride a strong social-media/influencer wave that Astron's audio category has not matched.
barriers: 3D Appliances and Promac compete almost entirely on price with minimal after-sales support, which limits their ability to win higher-margin, warranty-conscious households.
Condura's premium inverter refrigerator and aircon SKUs carry noticeably higher SRPs than Astron's equivalents, capping their reach in mass-market general-trade channels.
Camel and Hanabishi's kitchen/laundry lines skew toward smaller, lower-capacity units, leaving them weaker in the mid-to-large household segment Astron still holds.
Several competitor brands (Camel, 3D Appliances, TCL) leave SRPs unlisted/inconsistent across channels, creating pricing confusion that dealers flag as a trust issue.
